name: idea-engine
tagline: Type the idea. Get the verdict.
description: A single-input product discovery engine for solo developers. Describe an idea or frustration in plain language and get a buildability score, reasoning, and a concrete this-week action list.
bullets: Describe your idea or frustration in plain English
Get a buildability score 1–10 with full reasoning
Walk away with three concrete tasks for this week
Unlock the full build brief for $9
